scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1 DB --port 8788 --compatibility-date=2026-06-30
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:init:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --config wrangler.local.toml --file db/schema.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --config wrangler.local.toml --file db/schema.sql
